title: Pula Boat Hire: The 2026 Guide to Exploring the Adriatic
html:
Pula, on the tip of Istria, offers a gateway to the shimmering Adriatic Sea. Renting a boat from ACI Marina Pula opens up scores of offshore islands and hidden coves, with half-day motorboat costs starting from around €180. BoatHire24 connects you with verified local owners to make your trip straightforward.

Where to set off in Pula

ACI Marina Pula is the main departure point, with pontoons, fuel and provisioning. The smaller Marina Veruda, just south of the city, offers an alternative. For day trips, you can head to the Brijuni Islands national park, 6 nautical miles west, or the town of Fažana, a short hop from the mainland. The island of Mali Brijun has a safari park and a small harbour.

Which boat to rent

Selecting the right vessel depends on your group size, intended activities and budget. BoatHire24 lists dozens of options, from rib tenders to luxury yachts.

  1. Motorboat (6-8 guests), ideal for exploring coves and beaches; from €180 for a half day.
  2. Sailing yacht (6-10 guests), classic Adriatic cruising, with overnight cabins; from €450 for a full day.
  3. Catamaran (8-12 guests), spacious and stable, great for day trips to Brijuni; from €700 full day.
  4. Crewed gulet (10-15 guests), traditional wooden boat with skipper and crew; from €1,500 full day. For a luxury experience, consider the Azimut 58 for hire, a 17.7-metre flybridge motor yacht sleeping up to 8.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Pula?

Prices vary by boat size, season and trip duration, but typical per-day rates fall into clear bands. The table below gives an overview.

  • Shared excursion (speedboat, max 12 guests): €60 per person for 4 hours.
  • Small motorboat (4-6 guests) half-day: €150-€250.
  • Catamaran (8-12 guests) full-day: €600-€1,200.
  • Crewed motor yacht (8+ guests) full-day: from €1,000. For a full list of options, browse boats for your dates and compare verified listings.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Pula?

In Croatia, a recognised boating licence is required for bareboat charters unless the owner provides a skipper. Skippered boats (with a professional captain) can be hired without a licence. BoatHire24 encourages guests to confirm requirements with the operator before booking.

If you plan to explore the Brijuni Islands, book a mooring overnight at Fažana harbour, it is quieter than the crowded coves and gives early access to the national park.

The high season runs from June to September, when the mistral wind moderates afternoon heat. Spring and autumn offer milder conditions and fewer crowds.

How boat rental works

Booking on BoatHire24 is straightforward: search, compare, and reserve online. Each listing shows boat details, photos, hire conditions and cancellation policies. Payment is handled securely through the platform. For a step‑by‑step guide, read how boat rental works before you book.

At a glance

  • Price range: €150, €1,500 per day
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: 4 hours to multi-day
  • Capacity: 4, 15 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Pula

Can I rent a boat in Pula for a day without a licence?

Yes, you can hire a skippered boat without holding a licence, as the owner provides a qualified skipper.

What is the best time to rent a boat in Pula?

June and September offer warm weather and calm seas, with July and August being the busiest and most expensive months.

Is it possible to anchor overnight near the Brijuni Islands?

Anchoring is allowed in designated areas; you must clear customs and national park fees if you land on the islands.

How far is it from Pula to the Brijuni Islands by boat?

The distance from ACI Marina Pula to the main island of Veliki Brijun is approximately 6 nautical miles, a 20‑30 minute cruise.

Whether you are a first‑time visitor or a seasoned sailor, BoatHire24 makes it easy to find a boat in Pula for your 2026 trip. For owners, the platform offers a simple way to check availability and reach a global audience of renters.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Pula and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
